case_title: HUENEMANN, TRACEY R. vs. LONDON FOG INDUSTRIES, INC.

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUENEMANN, TRACEY R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LONDON FOG INDUSTRIES, INC. $2,584.68 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,664.68

REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUENEMANN, TRACEY R. AS TO DEFENDANT LONDON FOG INDUSTRIES, INC.
